instructions: Use ygg_query first for structural coding questions when a project graph exists. Check freshness, evidence.families, evidence.planes, and nextActions before trusting missing evidence. Treat returned systems as the work-area orientation, architecture as auditable evidence, snippets as already-read source context, and relationships as nearby mechanical edges before broad grep. Use ygg_node for one exact file, node, package, system, or evidence target; ambiguous labels return choices. Use ygg_status for graph freshness, basis, query-index readiness, evidence-family readiness, coverage, plugin package caveats, and next actions. When coverage or nextActions show skipped unsupported source, follow the surfaced plugin workflow commands: registry/list, gap, new, dry-run, diagnose, and core-check. Extractor plugins may enhance core rows or add unsupported file-family rows after core extraction; unbenchmarked or project-local plugin output is non-authoritative review evidence. Use ygg_systems for a compact systems view. Treat Yggdrasil output as mechanical facts plus accepted correction facts/metadata; do not infer architecture from names or path vocabulary.

tools.name: ygg_query
tools.description: Return the primary one-shot Yggdrasil context packet for an agent question.

tools.name: ygg_node
tools.description: Inspect one exact graph node or source file target with mechanical neighbors and source context.

tools.name: ygg_systems
tools.description: Return the canonical ygg.graph/v2 systems graph JSON.

tools.name: ygg_sync_inspect
tools.description: Return project config plus the current mechanical evidence surface without syncing.

tools.name: ygg_status
tools.description: Return agent-facing freshness, query-index readiness, evidence surface, coverage, and next actions without syncing.

tools.name: ygg_sync_check
tools.description: Return the read-only maintenance check report for a project.

tools.name: ygg_sync_activity
tools.description: Import project queue lifecycle and result audit facts into local activity rows.

tools.name: ygg_work_list
tools.description: List project queue work items without claiming them.

tools.name: ygg_work_show
tools.description: Return one project queue work item without changing its state.

tools.name: ygg_work_pull
tools.description: Claim one ready project queue item for an agent.

tools.name: ygg_work_heartbeat
tools.description: Extend the lease for one claimed project queue item.

tools.name: ygg_work_complete
tools.description: Complete a claimed project queue item with a schema-bearing result object.

tools.name: ygg_work_release
tools.description: Release one claimed project queue item back to ready.

tools.name: ygg_work_reject
tools.description: Reject one project queue item with a reason.
